description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
At 3:51pm, a WeRide vehicle (Car1) was attempting to make a u-turn at 6 mph on Northwestern parkway. During the u-turn maneuver, a 
white chevy cruze (Car 2) traveling at 23 mph, having just made a right turn off of Walsh Ave., approached from behind on northwestern 
parkway. Car 2 steered left just before the impact but still clipped the front left side bumper of Car 1 with its (car2's) right side. The damage 
sustained to Car 1 was on the front bumper, left side, and the damage sustained to Car 2 was on the right passenger's door. Both parties 
pulled over to exchange information. The other party vehicle owner (of car2), Sagardeep Singh. was not driving the vehicle but was seated 
in the front passenger seat and Gurdeep Singh was driving the vehicle at the time of accident.
There were no injuries reported and no emergency responders were called.
Print
Clear Form
